title: Openers v2 r2 — opener-05 show-you (Hallo2 tier, wave-2 audio: 8/10)

inputRefs.sourceClip: single source still src_opener05.jpg (same still as the owner-praised v2 take) — Hallo2 still-animation tier
inputRefs.script: Let me show you what that would look like with an agent doing it. (3.2 s)
inputRefs.ttsReference: CosyVoice2 clone, audio re-roll wave-2 winner w2-pb-s777 (long28 concatenated ref, comma prosody variant — same words verbatim, seed 777) — Gemini judge 8/10 (runner-up w2-lr-s3 also 8); upgrades the 7/10 zs-s7 of the owner-praised take. Brisker 3.2 s read vs the original 5.0 s — both kept for A/B. Wav at gs://openagentsgemini-oa-artifacts/sarah-avatar/openers-v2/opener-05-show-you-r2.wav

modelVersions.hallo2: Hallo2 (MIT) inference_long.py, 512^2 audio-driven portrait animation, 16-frame chunks x 40 DDIM steps, net.pth + wav2vec2-base-960h
modelVersions.cosyvoice: CosyVoice2-0.5B zero-shot clone (long-reference), TTS run on the A100 experiment host — prod L4 untouched

inputRefs.renderCommand: python scripts/inference_long.py --config configs/inference/v2r2_opener05.yaml (A100 40GB, clean save_path v2r2_opener05)
inputRefs.recipe: Hallo2 still-animation quality tier: wave-2 judge-winner audio over the same calm source still; re-mux with full-band judged wav, measured-gain -0.2 dB to -16.9 LUFS (alimiter -3.0 dB), libx264 CRF16 slow. No SR pass — the S-Lab-encumbered video_sr.py lane is retired pending a license-clean upscaler

sttRoundTrip.transcriber: whisper small.en on the final mux
sttRoundTrip.notes: verbatim: 'Let me show you what that would look like with an agent doing it.'

pauseTiming.notes: judge flagged a slight artificial pause after 'look like'; the wave-1 low-frequency rumble and flat-ending defects are gone

prosody.notes: judge: 'A highly polished and professional delivery that almost perfectly mimics a human presenter.' Same rubric/method as the 07-09 bake-off

ownerPlaybackVerdict.notes: NEW take — awaiting owner playback of ~/Desktop/sarah-openers-v2/opener-05-show-you-hallo2-r2.mp4. The ORIGINAL opener-05 take was called 'close to shippable' by the owner and is kept unchanged beside it; this r2 only upgrades the audio (8/10 vs 7/10) with a brisker read — owner picks on A/B

avSync.notes: speech onset articulation visible in consecutive-frame reads; full 3-point sync check deferred to playback review

cropSharpness.notes: 512^2 native output soft vs 720p source; FLAIR evaluated as the permissive upscaler and REJECTED (runtime ~33 min per second of video on A100, S-Lab CodeFormer aux inside its sampling loop, hard 512^2 output cap) — raw 512^2 stays the ship tier

temporalBoil.notes: 6 consecutive frames at t=1.4 s (corrected mouth crop): broad smile with defined teeth, smooth articulation, zero boil, stable identity

metrics.periodicHitch: mod-16 phase max 2.29 vs 1.26 mean — no dominant seam; in family with the owner-praised original (1.87 vs 1.14)

chunkBoundaryJerk.notes: healthy articulation; motion profile matches the take the owner called close to shippable

identityDrift.notes: identity faithful to source still across sampled frames and full-frame stills

pasteBackSeam.notes: no paste-back — Hallo2 generates the full frame

videoGates.notes: same proven still + recipe as the owner-praised v2 take; only the audio changed (8/10 vs 7/10, faster read)

operationalGates.gpuType: GCE a2-highgpu-1g, 1x NVIDIA A100-SXM4-40GB (us-central1-f, SPOT) — sarah-hallo2-exp-1
operationalGates.costNotes: ~175 s inference + remux/QA share at ~$1.30/h spot; session total in the run closeout receipt

artifactExistenceCheck.notes: gsutil stat on final mp4 + winner wav + qa crops/strips + provenance JSONs (12/12 OK)

verdictSummary: Audio re-roll target achieved: 8/10 (w2-pb-s777, verbatim; up from 7/10 zs-s7). Same approved still/recipe as the near-shippable original, which stays unchanged for A/B. Zero boil, stable identity, no dominant chunk seam. Awaiting owner playback; sharpness tier stays raw 512^2 (FLAIR rejected on runtime + license).
